name: tubegenius
description: Full-stack Django & Next.js platform with comprehensive quality checks

scripts.check:frontend: cd frontend && pnpm lint && pnpm prettier:check && pnpm type-check
scripts.check:frontend-platform: cd frontend-platform && pnpm lint && pnpm prettier:check && pnpm type-check
scripts.check:backend: cd backend && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.format: cd frontend && pnpm prettier:fix && pnpm lint:fix
scripts.format:frontend-platform: cd frontend-platform && pnpm prettier:fix && pnpm lint:fix
